message:
bd-ml2r.11.4: add structured evidence log schema for FNX QA

- Add evidence.rs module in fm-core with canonical log types:
  - EvidenceLogEntry: scenario_id, input_hash, fnx_mode, projection_mode,
    decision_mode, fnx_algorithm, parse_ms, analysis_ms, layout_ms,
    render_ms, diagnostic_count, fallback_reason, witness_hash,
    output_hash, pass_fail_reason
  - FnxMode, ProjectionMode, DecisionMode enums matching contract
  - FallbackReason and PassFailReason for deterministic status
  - EvidenceBundle for aggregating entries with summary stats
- Add JSON Schema for external validation
- Export types from fm-core for use in CLI/WASM/regression harness
- 10 unit tests covering serialization and state machine logic

Implements structured log schema per fnx-deterministic-decision-contract.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
